title: ficus deltoidea var. oligoneura
intro: Ficus deltoidea var. oligoneura, also known as the Bintangor or Riddlo, is a plant species belonging to the fig family (Moraceae), native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic effects. The health benefits of Ficus deltoidea var. oligoneura include reducing blood sugar levels, managing cholesterol levels, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
